title: Jamaican Shrimp Noodle Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry made with jamaican-inspired flavors and shrimp. Serve over noodles for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
Remove shrimp from skillet and set aside.
Add savory soy sauce and spicy jamaican jerk seasoning to skillet and stir to combine.
Add cooked noodles to skillet and stir to combine with soy sauce mixture.
Return shrimp to skillet and stir to combine with noodles and sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer noodles and shrimp to a serving platter and garnish with green onions and cilantro.
Serve with lime wedges on the side.
